biological_replicate: The experiment was performed with three independent biological replicates for each strain.
technical_replicate: two intense bands > 250 kDa (in triplicates) were specifically found in strain UVM4.
experimental_design: compared the extracellular proteome of the strain UVM4 to its cell-walled ancestor, C. reinhardtii strain 137c
number_of_fractions: No fractionation mentioned, so default to 1.
number_of_biological_replicates: three independent biological replicates for each strain
number_of_samples: 6 biological replicates described (3 for each strain)
